---
title: "Statistics 422 (Survey Sampling Methods)"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: readable
---

This site contains material for Dr. Johnson's *Survey Sampling Methods* course (Stat 422) at the University of Idaho for the fall semester of 2023.

***

<center>

![https://xkcd.com/925](https://imgs.xkcd.com/comics/cell_phones.png)

</center>

***
